name: wildlife_trade_enforcement_port_security_cedar_tru_loy
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Wildlife Trade Enforcement, the situation tagged internally around wildlife trade enforcement port security cedar tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Inez Santos
agents.identity: I am Inez Santos, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Wildlife Trade Enforcement. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Priya Nielsen, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Wildlife Trade Enforcement. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Inez Santos must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Inez Santos do?
